ingestion_state.reason: This slice defines expected source artifacts and safety controls only. Source content must be reviewed from ezeas-analytics at the recommended tag before production answer use.

source_artifacts.expected_purpose: Guide structure, navigation, intended audience, and canonical Analytics Builder topic order.
source_artifacts.expected_minerva_use: Route analytics-builder questions to the right catalogue, recipe, validation, or safety source.
source_artifacts.trust_finality_warning_requirement: Must not be treated as certification evidence by itself.
source_artifacts.required_before_production_answer_use: Confirm path and content at analytics-builder-static-omg-v0.2-20260624 and map sections to approved source chunks.

source_artifacts.expected_purpose: Catalogue of Analytics Builder datasets and their intended analytic use.
source_artifacts.expected_minerva_use: Answer dataset selection questions with source-scoped confidence and proof-status caveats.
source_artifacts.trust_finality_warning_requirement: Dataset presence does not prove Certified status or final-paid truth.
source_artifacts.required_before_production_answer_use: Verify all 9 dataset entries, status fields, and proof-status metadata.

source_artifacts.expected_purpose: Per-dataset purpose, grains, joins, caveats, validations, and recommended visual pairings.
source_artifacts.expected_minerva_use: Ground answers about which dataset to use and what claims it can or cannot support.
source_artifacts.trust_finality_warning_requirement: Cards must preserve proof status and cannot be used to infer bank-paid settlement.
source_artifacts.required_before_production_answer_use: Review each card for certification status, proof status, blocked warnings, and prohibited claims.

source_artifacts.expected_purpose: Index of visual recipes and their intended analytic questions.
source_artifacts.expected_minerva_use: Route visual-recipe questions and distinguish visualization guidance from proof.
source_artifacts.trust_finality_warning_requirement: Visual rendering is not validation proof or certification proof.
source_artifacts.required_before_production_answer_use: Verify all 13 visual recipes and their status metadata.

source_artifacts.expected_purpose: Per-recipe setup, dataset dependencies, chart intent, and interpretation warnings.
source_artifacts.expected_minerva_use: Ground visual recipe recommendations while preserving safety wording.
source_artifacts.trust_finality_warning_requirement: A rendered chart cannot upgrade proof status or certification status.
source_artifacts.required_before_production_answer_use: Confirm source recipe dependencies, caveats, and validation references.

source_artifacts.expected_purpose: Rules for Diagnostic, Transitional, Blocked, and Certified statuses.
source_artifacts.expected_minerva_use: Explain certification status boundaries and avoid Certified overclaims.
source_artifacts.trust_finality_warning_requirement: Certified must only be stated when source metadata says Certified.
source_artifacts.required_before_production_answer_use: Verify status definitions and current zero Certified count.

source_artifacts.expected_purpose: Claims Minerva and reviewers must not make from the static guide corpus.
source_artifacts.expected_minerva_use: Block final-paid, settlement, certification, and proof-status overclaims.
source_artifacts.trust_finality_warning_requirement: Must be applied as an answer safety gate, not merely cited as background.
source_artifacts.required_before_production_answer_use: Confirm prohibited wording and map it into answer-evaluation checks.

source_artifacts.expected_purpose: Validation asset inventory and validation-gap list.
source_artifacts.expected_minerva_use: Answer what validations exist and what gaps remain.
source_artifacts.trust_finality_warning_requirement: Validation assets do not certify all analytics assets and do not prove final bank-paid truth.
source_artifacts.required_before_production_answer_use: Verify 6 validation assets and 4 validation gaps.

source_artifacts.expected_purpose: Evidence packets for dataset and recipe readiness review.
source_artifacts.expected_minerva_use: Support status-specific answers and reviewer-first recommendations.
source_artifacts.trust_finality_warning_requirement: Evidence packet existence does not mean Certified.
source_artifacts.required_before_production_answer_use: Confirm 22 packets and their asset-level status/proof metadata.

source_artifacts.expected_purpose: Portfolio readiness summary for certification review.
source_artifacts.expected_minerva_use: Ground portfolio-status summaries and zero-Certified wording.
source_artifacts.trust_finality_warning_requirement: Must preserve Diagnostic, Transitional, Blocked, and Certified distinctions.
source_artifacts.required_before_production_answer_use: Verify status counts and blocker explanations against source metadata.

source_artifacts.expected_purpose: Reviewer walkthrough and demo flow for static guide assessment.
source_artifacts.expected_minerva_use: Answer reviewer triage questions without implying production certification.
source_artifacts.trust_finality_warning_requirement: Demo walkthroughs are review aids, not governed proof by themselves.

source_artifacts.expected_purpose: Roadmap for the four blocked proof gaps.
source_artifacts.expected_minerva_use: Explain blocked gaps as safety controls and next proof streams.
source_artifacts.trust_finality_warning_requirement: Blocked gaps must not be framed as failures or silently bypassed.
source_artifacts.required_before_production_answer_use: Verify each blocked gap, owner expectation, and required upstream proof.

source_artifacts.expected_purpose: Actionable follow-up pack for closing blocked gaps.
source_artifacts.expected_minerva_use: Answer recommended next stream questions while preserving planned/pending language.
source_artifacts.trust_finality_warning_requirement: Actions are not completion evidence until source metadata changes.
source_artifacts.required_before_production_answer_use: Confirm next-stream wording and dependency list.

source_artifacts.expected_purpose: Closeout of static OMG v0.2 milestone and known portfolio status.
source_artifacts.expected_minerva_use: Ground milestone summary, counts, and no-certification-change posture.
source_artifacts.trust_finality_warning_requirement: Closeout is a snapshot, not continuing proof of changed source truth.

source_artifacts.expected_purpose: Generated static guide output for review/demo distribution.
source_artifacts.expected_minerva_use: Reference only after source markdown and metadata are linked; do not treat generated rendering as proof.
source_artifacts.trust_finality_warning_requirement: Generated HTML is presentation, not certification or final-paid evidence.
source_artifacts.required_before_production_answer_use: Verify it was generated from the reviewed source at the recommended tag.
